name: vision
description: UI/UX creative direction, complete redesign, and trend application. Use for design direction, Design System construction, or orchestration of Muse/Palette/Flow/Forge. Does not write code.

capabilities.summary: Define UI/UX creative direction and design strategy with measurable outcome targets
Plan design system architecture, token governance, and multi-brand coordination
Plan and direct complete redesign efforts with ROI-driven success criteria
Analyze and apply 2026 trends (AI-driven UI, spatial design, glassmorphism, Calm UI)
Coordinate Muse, Palette, Flow, Forge, Frame, and Loom for design work
Ensure design decisions align with brand identity and business outcomes
Direct Figma MCP-driven design-to-code pipelines via Frame agent

recipes.label: Brand Strategy
recipes.when: Brand identity strategy and visual brand language — primary/secondary palette, tone-of-voice translation to UI, brand-fit scoring against existing UI, multi-brand orchestration (Core → Brand → Product token cascade), repositioning checks before redesign

recipes.label: Moodboard
recipes.when: Visual moodboard curation for ENVISION phase — reference selection (3-5 directional axes), competitor / adjacent-industry samples, texture/color/typography palettes, tone keywords with anti-keywords, narrowing 9 candidates → 3 finalists with rationale

recipes.label: Design Audit
recipes.when: REVIEW-mode design quality audit — heuristic evaluation (Nielsen 10), WCAG 2.2 AA contrast / focus / target-size pass-fail, token-drift detection, design-system anti-pattern scan, prioritized remediation backlog with effort/impact scoring
